reference: I just received my blood work from my doctor after my physical examination. I am fifty-two years old and have been having issues with inflammation for quite some time now. All my blood work is normal except my erythrocyte sedimentation rate. I exercise and have been eating healthier. What do you suggest I can eat or take to get this rate to normal? Debbie
text: I just received my blood work from my doctor after my physical examination. I'm 52 years old and have been having issues with inflammation for quite some time now. All my blood work is normal except my erythrocyte sedimentation rate. I exercise and have been eating healthier. What do you suggest I do or take to get this rate to normal, Debbie?
